title: lupinaster pentaphyllus subsp. albus
intro: Lupinaster pentaphyllus subsp. albus, also known as the white-fruited five-leaved lupin, is a plant species belonging to the Lupinaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lupinaster pentaphyllus subsp. albus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Traditionally, this plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
